user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new work area for a location, so that physical spaces within each office are defined
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Work Area screen; When I click Add new work area and provide the location, work area and applicability; Then the work area is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view work areas with their location and applicability, so that I can verify how spaces map to offices
acceptance_criteria: Given work areas exist; When I view the list; Then each row shows Location, Work area and Applicability

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing work area, so that I can update its applicability or details
acceptance_criteria: Given a work area is listed; When I click Edit and change its details; Then the updated work area is saved

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to page through and refresh the work area list, so that I can review all configured work areas
acceptance_criteria: Given more work areas exist than one page; When I use pagination or Refresh; Then the list reloads with current work areas
